message:
feat(analytics,pages,search): analytics validation overhaul, GitHub deploy page, search query expansion

- Major analytics validation restructuring (~457 lines) with improved
  metric boundary checks and error classification
- Expand deploy_github page with additional deployment workflow steps
- Search query pipeline expansion with additional result processing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
